public_reputation: Known around Fairhaven through day-to-day work as alchemist.
appearance: Thalen Sunweave usually presents in bright-plumed coat brushed too often for comfort, with details that make their alchemist status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Moves with careful precision and contamination-aware caution, treating every mixture as a consequence waiting to happen. In Fairhaven, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of alchemist in and around Fairhaven, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Fairhaven workable through the obligations of alchemist while managing the immediate pressure of glyph corruption, celestial creatures at Watcher’s Perch, suspicious travelers in taverns.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of alchemist credible while absorbing the strain created by glyph corruption, celestial creatures at Watcher’s Perch, suspicious travelers in taverns.

adventure_hooks.summary: Thalen Sunweave can draw the party into a locality problem centered on alchemist duties in Fairhaven.
Thalen Sunweave becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with glyph corruption, celestial creatures at Watcher’s Perch, suspicious travelers in taverns around Fairhaven.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: In public, Thalen Sunweave is immediately readable as a alchemist tied to Fairhaven.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Fairhaven: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Thalen Sunweave presents as someone shaped by the duties of a alchemist and the daily pressures of Fairhaven.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a alchemist, and proof that strangers will not make Fairhaven harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Thalen Sunweave refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a alchemist too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can supply protective mixtures, identify contamination, or decode reagent use.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Thalen Sunweave adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Thalen Sunweave always knows more about Fairhaven than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a alchemist in Fairhaven.
